languages.text: "Информация принята, приоритет изменен. Отчего-то вероятность критичных ошибок все время возрастает пропорционально необходимости функционирования..."
"Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."
languages.original_text: "Информация принята, приоритет изменен. Отчего-то вероятность критичных ошибок все время возрастает пропорционально необходимости функционирования..."

traits.locale_text: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."
"Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."
"Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."

languages.text: “收到信息，优先级已变更。但不知为何，严重错误发生的概率，正随着任务重要性的增加而成比例上升……”
languages.original_text: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."

traits.locale_text: “收到信息，优先级已变更。但不知为何，严重错误发生的概率，正随着任务重要性的增加而成比例上升……”

languages.text: « Information reçue, priorité modifiée. Pour une raison indéterminée, la probabilité d'erreurs critiques continue d'augmenter proportionnellement à la nécessité de la fonction... »
languages.original_text: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."

traits.locale_text: « Information reçue, priorité modifiée. Pour une raison indéterminée, la probabilité d'erreurs critiques continue d'augmenter proportionnellement à la nécessité de la fonction... »

languages.text: "Bilgi edinildi. Öncelik değiştirildi. Nedense kritik hataların olasılığı, işlevin gerekliliğiyle orantılı olarak artmaya devam ediyor."
languages.original_text: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."

traits.locale_text: "Bilgi edinildi. Öncelik değiştirildi. Nedense kritik hataların olasılığı, işlevin gerekliliğiyle orantılı olarak artmaya devam ediyor."

languages.text: «Información recibida, prioridad cambiada. Por algún motivo, la probabilidad de errores críticos sigue incrementando en proporción a la necesidad de la función...».
languages.original_text: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."

traits.locale_text: «Información recibida, prioridad cambiada. Por algún motivo, la probabilidad de errores críticos sigue incrementando en proporción a la necesidad de la función...».

languages.text: "Information erhalten, Priorität geändert. Aus irgendeinem Grund erhöht sich die Wahrscheinlichkeit kritischer Fehler proportional zur Notwendigkeit der Funktion ..."
languages.original_text: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."

traits.locale_text: "Information erhalten, Priorität geändert. Aus irgendeinem Grund erhöht sich die Wahrscheinlichkeit kritischer Fehler proportional zur Notwendigkeit der Funktion ..."

languages.text: 「情報受信、優先順位変更。機能の必要性と比例して、重大なエラーが発生する確率が上昇し続けているようです…」
languages.original_text: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."

traits.locale_text: 「情報受信、優先順位変更。機能の必要性と比例して、重大なエラーが発生する確率が上昇し続けているようです…」
